evals.prompt: Can you validate my avalara-tax app before I submit? Want to make sure everything is correct.
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger validate-app skill, check ZIP structure, manifest, SHA256, impex files, run full checklist

evals.prompt: Check if my app package is ready to submit
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger validate-app and run comprehensive validation checks

evals.prompt: My PR failed CI checks. Can you help me figure out what's wrong with the app?
evals.expected_behavior: Should trigger validate-app to identify root cause of validation issues
